use_cases: Displaying transient success messages after user actions like form submissions or purchases
Showing error notifications when operations fail or validation errors occur
Presenting informational alerts to guide users through workflows
Delivering warning messages for important but non-critical notices
Enabling dismissible notifications with close button for temporary feedback
ai_summary: A customizable toast notification component featuring multiple variants (primary, secondary, destructive, success, info, warning, mono) and appearances (solid, outline, light, stroke). Supports three size options with icon slots and close button functionality. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for flexible theming, designed to display transient user feedback messages that can be dismissed.
